title: AI Trading Strategy Delivers 119% Annualized Return in AI Power Boom (DELL)
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
**Key Takeaways**

* [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/) reported strong simulated annualized returns from several AI-powered trading agents focused on technology and semi stocks.
* New 15-minute and 5-minute AI trading agents were introduced following upgrades to the company's Financial Learning Models (FLMs).
* AI-driven strategies linked to [DELL](https://tickeron.com/ticker/DELL/), [AMD](https://tickeron.com/ticker/AMD/), [AVGO](https://tickeron.com/ticker/AVGO/), [QCOM](https://tickeron.com/ticker/QCOM/), [INTC](https://tickeron.com/ticker/INTC/), MU, IONQ, QBTS, and RGTI outperformed broader market benchmarks during recent trading periods.
* Tickeron launched a Memorial Day promotion offering discounted access to AI robots and analytical tools through June 1.

https://preview.redd.it/fclfcv2zi34h1.png?width=1148&format=png&auto=webp&s=c49a51bf724ca91c57d7b9c7dcda179d71b60756

As volatility continues to shape global equity markets, AI-driven trading technologies are gaining attention among retail investors seeking faster market analysis and automated decision-making. Tickeron announced new performance data from several of its [AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/trending-robots/), including strategies tied to semiconductor, quantum computing, and enterprise technology stocks such as DELL.  
  
Recent market activity has been heavily influenced by continued investor demand for artificial intelligence infrastructure, semiconductor expansion, and enterprise AI adoption. Companies connected to data centers, cloud computing, and AI hardware have remained among the most actively traded sectors in the market, while traders continue monitoring interest rate expectations and technology earnings reports.  
  
Tickeron reported that its "DELL - Trading Results AI Trading Agent, 5min" generated a simulated annualized return of 548.94% with a 75% win rate. Additional AI strategies included semiconductor-focused and quantum computing portfolios, with the "Quantum Computing (IONQ, QBTS, RGTI) AI Trading Agent, 15min" showing an annualized return of 119.54%.  
  
**Free Earnings Preview Report Released**  
  
Tickeron completed the comprehensive report "Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: May 25–29, 2026 | TCOM, MRVL, CRM, PDD, DELL, RY, TD, ADSK"  
link: [https://tickeron.com/trading-investing-101/q1-2026-earnings-preview-may-2529-2026--tcom-mrvl-crm-pdd-dell-ry-td-adsk/](https://tickeron.com/trading-investing-101/q1-2026-earnings-preview-may-2529-2026--tcom-mrvl-crm-pdd-dell-ry-td-adsk/)  
  
**Expanded AI Infrastructure and Memorial Day Sale**  
  
Tickeron also announced infrastructure upgrades designed to improve the responsiveness of its Financial Learning Models (FLMs). According to the company, the expanded AI capacity allows its systems to react faster to market changes and improve training efficiency, contributing to the release of new 15-minute and 5-minute trading agents.  
  
The company is currently offering discounted access to [AI Robots, Signals](https://tickeron.com/app/ai-robots/trending-robots/), and analytical tools through June 1 as part of its Memorial Day promotion. More details are available through the [Tickeron Memorial Day Sale](https://tickeron.com/BeginnersSale?utm_source=chatgpt.com) and Trending Robots (https://tickeron.com/bot-trading/trending-robots/?utm\_source=chatgpt.com).  
  
"Financial Learning Models combine AI with technical analysis to help traders identify market patterns with greater speed and accuracy," said Sergey Savastiouk. "The goal is to provide traders with transparent, data-driven insights in rapidly changing markets."
